authselect_test_framework.utils.oddjobd

Manage oddjobd on the client.

Classes

OddjobUtils(*args, **kwargs)

Management of oddjobd on the client host.
class authselect_test_framework.utils.oddjobd.OddjobUtils(*args, **kwargs)

Bases: MultihostUtility

Management of oddjobd on the client host.

Example usage
@pytest.mark.topology(Profile.SSSD)
def test_example(client: Client):
    client.authselect.select("sssd", ["with-mkhomedir"])
    client.oddjob.start()
Parameters:

  • host (MultihostHost) – Multihost object.

  • svc (SystemdServices) – Systemd utils.

start(*, enable: bool = True) → ProcessResult

Start oddjobd.

Parameters:

enable (bool, optional) – Enable the unit before starting, defaults to True

Returns:

SSH process result.

Return type:

ProcessResult

stop() → ProcessResult

Stop oddjobd.

Returns:

SSH process result.

Return type:

ProcessResult

enable(*, now: bool = False) → ProcessResult

Enable oddjobd.

Parameters:

now (bool, optional) – Enable and start the unit immediately, defaults to False

Returns:

SSH process result.

Return type:

ProcessResult

disable(*, now: bool = False) → ProcessResult

Disable oddjobd.

Parameters:

now (bool, optional) – Disable and stop the unit immediately, defaults to False

Returns:

SSH process result.

Return type:

ProcessResult
